## What Polymarket Tells Us
Polymarket is a prediction market where real money is wagered on outcomes.
High probability = crowd intelligence is pricing this likely.

## BTC-Related Markets (Current Sentiment)

### What price will Bitcoin hit by March 31? - Polymarket
resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for Bitcoin (BTCUSDT) between February 28, 13:00 and March 31, 2025, 23:59 in the ET timezone has a final "Low" price of $50,000 or lower. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No." The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTCUSDT "Low" prices available at  with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on

### Betting markets think bitcoin has already peaked this year
Crypto bulls aren't shaken by the jarring volatility this year, but betting markets think there are strong odds the token has just about peaked in 2025.

While betting markets predict that bitcoin is likely to edge above its record high of around $109,000 reached in January, bettors don't see much upside from there — and even if the token is to breach new highs, speculators are also gearing up for
Source: https://www.businessinsider.com/betting-markets-bitcoin-price-cryptocurrency-polymarket-trump-selloff-correction-ethereum-2025-3

### Bitcoin Predictions & Real-Time Odds - Polymarket
It cuts through the noise. Unlike polls or punditry, Polymarket shows you real-time odds on Bitcoin predictions backed by financial conviction that are often faster and more accurate than experts or surveys. You get an unbiased view of what thousands of traders think will actually happen, often more accurate than polls. Plus, you can trade shares and potentially profit if your predictions are spot
Source: https://polymarket.com/predictions/bitcoin

## Interpretation Rules
- If >65% probability on BTC reaching $X: crowd is BULLISH
- If <35% probability on BTC reaching $X: crowd is BEARISH
- Large swings in Polymarket odds often precede actual price moves by 24-48h
